# Pro Cleaning Services LLC — LLM Access File
# Professional cleaning company
# Salina, Kansas

> Pro Cleaning Services LLC provides residential and commercial
cleaning in Salina Kansas and Saline County. Services include home
cleaning, deep cleaning, move-in/move-out cleaning, and germ
prevention cleaning. Owner Jennifer Diehl is fully insured and
bonded with 10 years of experience.
Phone: 785-452-0793
Website: https://procleaningsalinaks.com

## Pages

/ — Homepage. Home cleaning, deep cleaning, move in/out, and germ
  prevention in Salina, Kansas.

/services.html — Overview of all services: home cleaning, move
  in/out cleaning, deep cleaning, and germ prevention in Salina
  and Saline County, Kansas.

/home-cleaning.html — Home cleaning in Salina, Kansas. Regular,
  weekly, bi-weekly, and monthly house cleaning.

/deep-cleaning.html — Deep cleaning in Salina, Kansas. Baseboards,
  appliance interiors, grout, behind furniture, and more.

/move-in-move-out.html — Move in and move out cleaning in Salina,
  Kansas. Every room, cabinet, closet, and corner cleaned.

/germ-prevention.html — Germ prevention, disinfection, and
  sanitizing in Salina, Kansas. High-touch surface treatment, virus
  and bacteria reduction.

/service-area.html — Service area: Salina and Saline County,
  Kansas. Based in Brookville, KS.

/about.html — About Jennifer Diehl, owner of Pro Cleaning Services.
  Fully insured and bonded, 10 years of experience.

/contact.html — Get a free quote. Call 785-452-0793, text, or fill
  out the online form.

/blog.html — Cleaning tips and local know-how, linking out to the
  full blog at blog.procleaningsalinaks.com.

## Service Area
Salina KS, Saline County, Central Kansas
